contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Sophia voice-note capture (on-box Whisper) + Telegram bot-token log hardening
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/100
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/101
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/299
  
  Details:
  Shipped voice-to-text capture for the Sophia/autopilot agent: a new app/voice.py runs faster-whisper on the box (base/int8 CPU, no_speech_prob silence guard) and the Telegram adapter now transcribes voice/audio notes and feeds the transcript through the normal chat path, per-topic session preserved. Audio stays local, zero API cost. Made it turnkey for re-clone by adding faster-whisper to requirements.txt and ffmpeg to the EC2 user-data bootstrap; installed both on the live box, restarted the service, and pre-warmed the model. Security: discovered the Telegram bot token was being printed in plaintext to journald via httpx INFO request logging (about 31800 lines) — set the httpx logger to WARNING to stop it, then cleaned the box (vacuumed 458MB of journald archives and scrubbed syslog and auth.log of token lines) and verified it is not in the public transcript repo. Documented the capability in agentic_ai_context. Also analyzed the DAO WhatsApp channel engagement trajectory (became a single-author broadcast) and designed the weak-signal capture pipeline this voice feature is the first stage of.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
